title: Lava Chicken Disc Backport
description: Backports the new Lava Chicken music disc.
body: Just backports the new Lava Chicken music disc. To obtain it, just kill a Chicken Jockey. Make sure to kill the zombie first or it won't drop. I'll add more versions probably at some point, most likely 1.12.2 and 1.7.10 if I can figure out how.
